response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to TypeScript, cloud (AWS), and AI-agent infrastructure, plus notable open-source contributions and technical leadership — but lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or direct enterprise GenAI deployment, which are core to the role.
strengths: Extensive TypeScript/Node.js experience across scalable cloud systems
Proven work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Strong technical leadership through open-source projects and mentorship
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production AI systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
Limited documentation of enterprise customer-facing AI deployment or evaluation pipelines
